channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Phone-sized AI: billion-parameter models train on consumer devices. VRAM drops up to 78% vs traditional models. Is your pocket GPU ready? 🔥 https://Blockchain.News/news/tether-qvac-bitnet-lora-smartphone-ai-training #AI #Blockchain #Tech
